narrative:
Twinsburg Twp C (precinct in Summit County) has 973 registered voters, with 56.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.5%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.3 percentage points.
